title: Current active focus
summary: Current focus is B5.1 provenance cleanup and Active Focus refresh before B6 persistent memory.
body: Current project focus: complete B5.1 by separating policy/brain answer provenance from actual runtime model inference provenance, refresh active focus records, and prepare a clean transition into B6 persistent memory.

facts.statement: We are working on B5.1 provenance cleanup and Active Focus refresh before B6 persistent memory.
B5 conversation quality baseline is implemented and passing.

evidence: User requested B5.1 provenance and active focus cleanup before B6.
